title: Improvement notice issued to Torbay Council : October 2025
body: "This improvement notice requires Torbay Council to take steps to improve its special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) services.  It follows an Ofsted and Care Quality Commission (CQC) area SEND report issued on 25 June 2025 that judged that there were widespread systemic failings, including:   4 areas for priority action 4 areas for improvement   "
